messages.content: Plan 4 days in Dubai with $3000 budget.

itinerary.title: Arrival & City orientation + La Perle show

activities.name: Dubai City Tour 7 Hour Private Expedition with Highlights
activities.description: Private 7-hour guided city tour to see Dubai's modern and historic highlights — ideal first-day orientation and photo stops (exteriors of Burj Khalifa, Dubai Marina, Palm viewpoints, old districts). Includes pick-up.
activities.notes: Great way to get your bearings. If you want to go up the Burj Khalifa, you'll need separate tickets — I can add those.

activities.name: Dubai La Perle Show by Dragon VIP Ticket with Transfers
activities.description: World-class live aqua-theatre show — spectacular stunts and staging. VIP ticket includes transfers.
activities.notes: Transfers included. Corroborate show time for the date you choose. La Perle has accessible seating options — request when booking.

activities.name: Dubai: Morning Heritage Safari by Vintage G-Class & Al Marmoom Oasis
activities.description: A heritage-themed morning safari in vintage G-Class vehicles to Al Marmoom Oasis — cultural and natural sights outside the city.
activities.notes: Good for early-morning cooler weather. Includes pick-up; check accessibility needs with the operator.

activities.name: Self-guided: Al Fahidi Historical Neighbourhood & Gold/Souk visit
activities.description: Explore the old town (Al Fahidi), Dubai Museum, and the traditional souks — great contrast to modern Dubai.
activities.notes: Low-cost and highly cultural. Plenty of vegan café options in the area — ask staff for vegan dishes.

activities.name: Night kayaking in Dubai with Burj Khalifa views
activities.time: Night (after sunset; operator will confirm start time)
activities.description: Guided night kayaking with views of the Burj Khalifa skyline — a unique, calm way to see the city lights from the water.
activities.notes: Wear quick-dry clothes. Confirm meeting point and whether transfers are included. Great for photos of the skyline at night.

activities.name: Morning / Leisure — relax or optional shopping
activities.description: Use this time to relax, swim, or visit Dubai Mall, Palm Jumeirah or a beach. (Burj Khalifa 'At The Top' tickets are optional add-ons.)
activities.notes: If you want, I can add Burj Khalifa timed tickets or a dinner reservation at a vegan-friendly restaurant.

activities.name: Dubai Desert Safari with BBQ (from Dubai, Sharjah, or Ajman)
activities.time: Evening (typical pickup mid-afternoon to evening program)
activities.description: Classic desert safari with dune driving, entertainment, and shared BBQ-style dinner at the camp.
activities.notes: BBQ menus can be meat-heavy — contact the operator in advance to request vegan options or carry vegan snacks. Transfers usually included.

activities.name: Jet Ski Dubai With Private Transfers
activities.description: Jet-ski session with private transfers — adrenaline and great coast views of Dubai Marina and Palm Jumeirah.
activities.notes: Life jackets provided. Confirm transfer details. Suitable for single riders; operators may have age/weight limits.

activities.name: BusTronomy Dubai experience
activities.description: A dining experience on a moving double-decker bus that tours Dubai’s illuminated landmarks while you eat.
activities.notes: Request a vegan meal when booking. The bus provides a relaxed final-night dinner and views of the city lights.

trip_plan.notes: Total activity cost (~695 EUR) is well under your $3000 budget. I left flights and hotels empty as requested. If you'd like I can (1) add Burj Khalifa tickets, (2) swap BusTronomy for the Jet Car (30 min, 240 EUR) or (3) change the desert option to the Heritage Desert Safari (227 EUR) — tell me your priorities (adventure, comfort, culture, nightlife) and I’ll adjust. Also confirm if you'd like me to book any items now and provide your preferred travel dates.

supervisor_instruction: The plan has been APPROVED by the critic. Please confirm if you want to generate the final response.
user_query: Plan 4 days in Dubai with $3000 budget.

steps.prompt: Plan 4 days in Dubai with $3000 budget.
steps.response: Routing to Trip_Planner: User gave destination (Dubai), duration (4 days) and budget ($3000), so we can build a full trip plan.

Here’s a ready 4-day Attractions-only plan for Dubai (1 traveler, $3000 budget). I picked a mix of city highlights, desert experiences, and water/adventure activities from the available bookable offers. Prices shown are the vendor prices returned (EUR). I kept the total well under your $3000 budget and added notes about vegan meal requests and accessibility where relevant. If you want any bookings removed/added, or want me to swap La Perle for the Jet Car (more thrill, pricier), tell me and I’ll update.

Quick summary:
- Duration: 4 days
- Travelers: 1
- Destination: Dubai
- Estimated activity cost (sum of selected bookable items): ~695 EUR (~USD 760, approx)

Booking links are included for each activity. Many operators offer transfers; where meals are included (desert BBQ, BusTronomy), ask them in advance for vegan options or bring snacks. Accessibility: most activities include transfers but check with the operator if you need wheelchair access or other assistance.

Detailed day-by-day itinerary (times are suggestions):

APPROVE: Solid 4-day attractions-only plan that matches the requested duration and stays well within the $3,000 budget. A few quick checks before booking: verify exact start/end times and transfer inclusions to avoid overlaps (especially Day 1 & Day 2 evening activities), confirm vegan meal options for the desert BBQ/BusTronomy/La Perle and any meal-inclusive tours, check accessibility/wheelchair seating and any operator restrictions (jet-ski weight/age limits), and confirm the very low €20 desert-safari price and overall EUR→USD totals. Consider adding Burj Khalifa tickets if you want that viewpoint.
